name: Food and beverage category overlay
change_note: Migrated from script CATEGORY_CHECKLIST into a composable category overlay.
checklist_hints: Ingredient list, allergen statement, nutrition/label materials, and food safety documents are present or requested.
Facility, importer, local representative, or registration requirements are checked for the destination market.
Additives, contaminants, health claims, and restricted ingredients are routed for current regulatory verification.

requirements.requirement: Verify food product classification, import route, facility/importer obligations, and destination-market admissibility from official sources.
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve food cases until destination-market classification and import obligations are verified.
requirements.notes: Seed category requirement; exact obligations vary by market and business model.

requirements.requirement: Check ingredient, allergen, nutrition, language, warning, date marking, origin, and health/nutrition claims for the destination market.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing label obligations or unsupported regulated claims require more information or human escalation.
requirements.notes: Route novel ingredients, special diet claims, infant/child products, and disease claims to human review.

sources.title: FDA: How to Start a Food Business
sources.confirms: FDA routes food businesses to applicable facility registration, labeling, import, and food safety responsibilities.

sources.title: FDA: Registration of Food Facilities and Other Submissions
sources.confirms: FDA food facility registration can apply to facilities that manufacture, process, pack, or hold food for U.S. consumption.

sources.title: CBP: Commercial Food Imports
sources.confirms: CBP directs commercial food importers to relevant food import requirements and agency coordination.

sources.title: FDA: Food Labeling & Nutrition
sources.confirms: FDA maintains U.S. food labeling and nutrition information, including label requirements and guidance.

sources.title: FDA: Food Allergies
sources.confirms: FDA explains major food allergens and food allergen labeling requirements.

gaps: Seed overlay: verify destination-market food regulator requirements per case.
